titles.title: Come Holy Spirit, I need you

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Come Holy Spirit, I need you; Come sweet Spirit, I pray Come in your strength and your power. Come in your own gentle way.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Come as a rest to the weary Come as a balm to the sore Come Lord as strength to my weakness Fill me with joy evermore

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Come like a spring in the desert Come to the withered of soul Lord let your sweet healing power, Touch me and make me whole

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Come Holy Spirit, I need you; Come sweet Spirit, I pray Come in your strength and your power. Come in your own gentle way. Come in your own gentle way.
